University Billiards Exam

Honor Board of Applied Dynamics & Geometrical Mechanics

Examination Period

Trinity Term 2026

Paper Reference

UB-MEC-402X

PHYSICS OF INCOMPRESSIBLE SPHERES

Mathematical Analysis of Elastic Collision Vectors, Friction Coefficients, and Boundary Refraction

Time Allowed: Three (3) Hours
Reading Time: Candidates are allocated 10 minutes of reading time before writing.
Invigilator-in-Charge: The Senior Proctor of the Academic Examinations Council

Instructions to Candidates

1. Silence and Conduct: Strictly quiet conditions must be maintained throughout the examination hall. Candidates are forbidden to communicate with, assist, or disrupt any other individual during the session.

2. Academic Regulations: Candidates must present themselves in compliance with formal academic dress guidelines and regulations as specified by the University Exams Registry.

3. Permitted Equipment: Only approved, non-programmable scientific calculators, regulation writing utensils, and architectural drawing instruments are permitted at the examination desks. No wireless, electronic, or communication-capable devices are allowed.

4. Queries: If a candidate requires assistance, discovers a mechanical issue in their terminal, or requires additional scripts, they must raise their hand in silence and await the arrival of an Invigilator.

5. Conclusion: Upon the final instruction to cease writing, candidates must immediately place all writing materials flat on the desk and remain seated until all examination materials are gathered and verified.

To be completed by the Candidate: Select Examination Discipline

Three-Cushion Snooker

© University Examinations Registry. DO NOT TURN OVER THIS PAGE UNTIL AUTHORIZED BY THE INVIGILATOR.
